titleStmt.title: SII 26.435: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 435. (A.R. No. 414 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Puyal vāyppa vaḷam peruga, etc., and mentions the queen Buvaṉamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

It records a gift of all incomes except the śiṟupāḍikāval, due from the dēvadāna lands of the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavardēvar of Śiṟṟingūr a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟan in Malāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanādu to Malaiyamāṉ Śokkapperumāḷ Poṉparappiṉāṉ alias Rājagambhīrach chēdiyarāyaṉ, of Kiḷiyūr in the same nāḍu, by him to provide for the procession during the festival of the above-mentioned god held in the month of Puraṭṭādi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyalvāyppa vaḷamperukap poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyalvāyppa maṇamakaḷum jayamakaḷum maṉaṅkaḷippa veṇpoṟkuṭai viḷaṅka velventaraṭi viḷaṅka cakkaramuñ ceṅkolun tik
kaṇaittuñ celanaṭappa maṉuniti taḻaittoṅka tirumakaḷum pārmakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa pakkakāl pulikāppa poṟpamainta muṭipuṉainta cempoṉ virasiṁhāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vi
ṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakecaripaṟmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīvirarājentra- coḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 6 Āṟāvatu rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppulipakavarde
varkku Innāṭṭuk kiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉ cokkapperumāḷ poṉparappiṉāṉa rāja- gambhīraccetiyarāyaṉeṉ Iṉṉāyaṉār puraṭṭātittirunāḷeḻuntaruḷukaikku Ivvūr tevar tevatāṉam nañcey pun
ceykaḷil nāṅkaḷ koḷḷum Āyaṅkaḷil ciṟupāṭikāval nikki maṟṟuḷḷa Epperppaṭṭa Āyaṅkaḷum viṭṭen kiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉ cokkapperumāḷ poṉparappiṉāṉa rājagambhīraccetiyarāyaṉeṉ malaiyamā
nkaḷ vaṅśattiluḷḷār Aḻivuceyvvār vallavaraiyaṉ cittam Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ¬ .§
Digital edition of SII 26.435 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
